active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

repaired_findings.summary: Registered Phase 16 tools now return auditable ok=false tool execution results on malformed approved replay instead of raising out of the real opt-in kernel path.

review_eval_decision.reason: Phase 16 changed the opt-in kernel/tool/store structural path only. Default retrieval, answer projection, scoring, and non-kernel public benchmark behavior did not change, so focused tests plus LoCoMo 5-case default-off and opt-in no-LLM structural smokes are sufficient for this phase; no benchmark-quality improvement is claimed.

longmemeval.reason: No LongMemEval retrieval, answer projection, scoring, or default public path changed in this structural kernel phase.

locomo.reason: LoCoMo 5-case no-LLM structural smoke verifies default-off public reports and opt-in kernel trace shape for the changed path.
